purpose: Input contract for the deterministic Chapter 4 non-LLM runtime workflow.
notes: This schema is for runtime execution after Layer 4, not for legal parsing.
The runtime supports both raw content-only review and richer workflow/record reviews.
field_inputs can override or prefill any of the 29 frozen Layer 4 SIR fields.

field_input_object_shape.value: Any JSON value supported by the target field.
evidence: Optional evidence snippets or source references.

top_level_structure.title: Optional title or heading.
top_level_structure.content_text: Optional raw content text for heuristic extraction.
top_level_structure.review_scope: Which detection targets to evaluate: content_only, workflow_only, record_only, or full.
top_level_structure.product_scope_hint: One or more product scopes to apply when filtering Layer 4 rules.
top_level_structure.channel_scope_hint: One or more channel scopes to apply when filtering Layer 4 rules.
top_level_structure.business_role_hint: Role used to filter intermediary/advisory-only Layer 4 rules.
top_level_structure.include_rule_families: Optional allow-list for Layer 4 rule families.
top_level_structure.exclude_rule_families: Optional deny-list for Layer 4 rule families.
top_level_structure.field_inputs: Optional direct overrides keyed by Layer 4 SIR field name.
top_level_structure.content_metadata: Optional content-side metadata that maps to Layer 4 content fields.
top_level_structure.workflow_metadata: Optional workflow-side metadata that maps to Layer 4 workflow fields.
top_level_structure.record_metadata: Optional record/archive metadata that maps to Layer 4 record fields.

example.title: 토스뱅크 대출
example.content_text: 토스뱅크 대출 중도상환수수료 없이 쉽고 간편하게 빌려요
